headline: TMUS Stock Jumps For Third Straight Day — BofA Says Starlink Isn’t A Threat To US Telecom
summary: Bank of America believes the recent decline in major telecom stocks is an overreaction, with Starlink unlikely to pose a meaningful competitive threat anytime soon.

headline: Trump plugs Dell at first-ever White House opening bell, sending shares soaring
summary: Trump rang the bell in the Oval Office to open Monday's trading as he launched investment accounts for babies born from 2025 through 2028.
